form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign 11th of 13 at Dundalk All Weather October 17 over 1408m, 6 len behind Spinning Around with 56kg at $13. On debut fifth of 15 at Roscommon May 12 over 1508m, 2.25 len behind Leblon Queen carrying 52.5kg at $17. Best form gives her a decent chance.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 8th of 13 at Navan on March 30 over 2011m, on rain affected going; 13 len behind Servare with 62.5kg at $12.
